replies.msg:
#ABC_Challenge ，即係Anywhere But China

大家只需要影低你身邊任何唔係中國製既產品，然後po上twitter，順便tag 3個Twitter 手足就得

Po既時候可以用呢個英文template，希望啲外國人可以一齊玩

#ABC_challenge is intended to raise the world awareness of 🇨🇳's economic infiltration to oppress world's freedom & human rights

Defend your own country by stop using 🇨🇳products
Showcast sth which is #AnywherebutChina
tag 3 frds to go on @

大家一齊玩啦，最好一日一po
沒有普選，唯有獨立

如果有外國人問你點玩，就用呢個template覆佢

How to take part in the #ABC_challenge ?

1. Simply take a photo of the product to prove it’s made #AnywherebutChina

2. Use “Retweet with Comment” if you hv been tagged by somebody already. If not, just create a new tweet.

3. Tag 3 friends
咁易玩，一齊來玩啦
大家屋企應該有唔少野唔係支国製，快d 影相放上Twitter一齊參加 #ABC_challenge 啦！
工會圖推po大法
大家唔鍾意呢個challenge?
